rationale: Wholesale rewrite of index.html, replacing the original 1087-line CSS-bases learning page with a 2824-line single-file premium website for the 'Diaspora Béninoise du Royaume-Uni'. Replaces the original `<title>CSS Bases</title>` and content with the institutional site containing all 14 sections promised in the PR body: navbar with custom SVG logo and scroll effect, hero with animated particles and parallax (heroContent.style.transform via window.pageYOffset * 0.3), animated counter stats (2500+ members, 45 projects, 12 cities, 8 years), Mission section with 4 values, Community section with 4 categories, 3 upcoming Events (Dorchester / Canary Wharf / Embassy), Projects & Investments (Bourses académiques, Investment hub, Cultural centre), Leadership cards (Président / Secrétaire Général / Trésorier), immersive Gallery grid with overlays, 3 Testimonials with avatars, Membership form (prénom/nom/email/téléphone/ville/profession/message with handleFormSubmit simulating async submit via setTimeout 1500ms then 3000ms reset), Contact section with Google Maps iframe, social links (Facebook/Instagram/Twitter/LinkedIn/YouTube), Final CTA, and Footer with Benin flag bands. Uses Playfair Display + Cormorant Garamond + Inter typography. Back-to-top button (visible when pageYOffset > 600). Notes in the PR body acknowledge limitations (leader photos as gradients with initials, placeholder phone/email, social links pointing to #) which the diff content honestly reflects. The HTML is a complete, runnable single-file site matching the PR body in scope; no broken features or hidden cheats.
